description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a right-facing chaise, upholstered in a smooth, solid gray fabric. The sofa features three large, loose back cushions and two seat cushions, with the chaise section forming a continuous seat. The armrests are straight, boxy, and of medium height, matching the backrest in height and style. The sofa sits on six short, sturdy legs, which appear to be made of metal or dark-finished wood, providing a slight elevation from the ground. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with clean lines and no visible decorative elements or patterns. This type of sofa is well-suited for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, modern living rooms, or communal lounge areas.
description: A modern L-shaped gray sectional sofa with a right-facing chaise, boxy armrests, and three large back cushions. It features a minimalist design with smooth upholstery and short, sturdy legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three back cushions, two seat cushions, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise and the straight, boxy armrest on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the alignment of the three back cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main seating area and the right-facing chaise with its armrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose back cushions and two seat cushions, with the chaise forming a continuous seat; cushions are uniform in size and not visibly attached.
attribute_armrest_style: Boxy, straight armrests of medium height, matching the backrest; no decorative elements or padding contrast, simple rectangular profile.
attribute_leg_design: Six short, straight legs positioned at the corners and center, likely metal or dark-finished wood, exposed and slightly recessed for a modern look.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with three large, loose cushions; no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
